zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Muscegros於大約1188年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾凱麥頓時，他的父親Robert de Mucegros32歲，母親Hilary de Foliot40歲。他和Ascelina Dives至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Muscegros was born about 1188, in Kemerton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Mucegros, was 32 and his mother, Hilary de Foliot, was 40. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ascelina Dives.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Muscegros est né environ 1188, à Kemerton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Mucegros, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hilary de Foliot, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ascelina Dives.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Muscegros um 1188 in Kemerton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Mucegros 32 und seine Mutter Hilary de Foliot 40. Er hatte mit Ascelina Dives mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Muscegros è nato il circa 1188 nel Kemerton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Mucegros, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Hilary de Foliot, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ascelina Dives.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Muscegrosが約1188年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケマートンで生まれた時，父Robert de Mucegrosは32歳，母Hilary de Foliotは40歳であった。彼はAscelina Divesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Muscegros(이)가 대략 1188년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 케머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Mucegros(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hilary de Foliot(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Ascelina Dives(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Muscegros родился около 1188 г. в местности кемиртон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Mucegros было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hilary de Foliot, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ascelina Dives.
